overall.description: A cinematic scene from a fantasy video game showing wizard students in robes gathered on castle grounds. The camera remains stationary, observing characters conversing near a large medieval fortress with distinctive red and gold striped walls and towering spires.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a fantasy castle courtyard with students in wizard robes gathered on the grass. The imposing striped fortress wall dominates the background, with towers and distant spires rising against a partly cloudy sky. Characters stand in small groups conversing, with one student prominently holding a broomstick in the center-right of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, observant gaze over a bustling fantasy castle courtyard where students in wizard robes gather. It begins with a wide view of the grassy grounds, focusing on small groups of characters engaged in conversation. As the eye wanders across the scene, a student holding a broomstick becomes a focal point in the center-right of the frame. The perspective then expands to emphasize the imposing red and gold striped fortress walls that dominate the background. Finally, the view lifts toward the towering spires and distant turrets rising against a partly cloudy sky.
